title: Conquest
writer: Waclaw Gasiorowski, Zoe Akins, S.N. Behrman
actors: Greta Garbo, Charles Boyer, Reginald Owen
plot: A Polish countess becomes Napoleon Bonaparte's mistress at the urging of Polish leaders who feel she could influence him to make Poland independent.
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 3 wins & 2 nominations total
